html:
Flummoxing Flame Puzzle

Exclusive to:

“Only when all torches burn shall the way be revealed.”

Flummoxing Flame Puzzle is a puzzle that appears in one of the rooms of the Sanctum. Solving the puzzle will allow players to get to the 3 rooms, including the room with the green Fountain of Knowledge.

Puzzle

NormalBroken

“The flame is calming. If only it would stay lit.”

-Flummoxing Flame

The puzzle consists of 9 Flummoxing Flames. To solve it, the player must activate all of them. When a Flummoxing Flame is activated, it will also toggle the state (active or inactive) of any adjacent Flummoxing Flames on its four sides. Among these Flummoxing Flames, there is one stuck and one broken Flummoxing Flame that spawn in random positions.

A stuck Flummoxing Flame is always activated and cannot be toggled.

A broken Flummoxing Flame cannot be directly used by the player, but it can still be toggled by the nearby Flummoxing Flames. Also, when a broken Flame becomes is activated, Shadow Hand will try to deactivate it. Players can step on the Hand to stop it.

Once all Flummoxing Flames are activated, Sanctum Rocks will appear, allowing the player to access the other 3 Sanctum Waymarks.

Trivia

  • The Flummoxing Flame Puzzle is added in Ancient Echoes: Phase Two update.

Flummoxing Flame Puzzle
Exclusive to:
“Only when all torches burn shall the way be revealed.”
Flummoxing Flame Puzzle is a puzzle that appears in one of the rooms of the Sanctum. Solving the puzzle will allow players to get to the 3 rooms, including the room with the green Fountain of Knowledge.

NormalBroken
“Is that a light switch?”
–Wilson
“Light'em up!”
–Willow
“Oh good, bright light for Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang
“A light in the darkness.”
–Wendy
“INTERCONNECTED LIGHTING UNIT”
–WX-78
“A finely crafted ancient torch.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's a big oil lamp.”
–Woodie
“On or off? Make up your mind.”
–Maxwell
“A flame tö banish the shadöws!”
–Wigfrid
“We know how it works!”
–Webber
“Mood lighting!”
–Warly
“Torch friend”
–Wormwood
“A fine lookin' torch.”
–Winona
“That light's alright!”
–Wortox
“We switch!”
–Wurt
“There's a neat little switch that turns it on and off!”
–Walter
“Is there an order to this.”
–Wanda
“The switch looks broken.”
–Wilson
“Stupid broken switch.”
–Willow
“It is broken?”
–Wolfgang
“It's broken.”
–Wendy
“SWITCH NOT OPERATIONAL”
–WX-78
“The switch appears to be broken.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's broken.”
–Woodie
“Of course it's broken.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis bröken.”
–Wigfrid
“Aw, it's broken.”
–Webber
“I'm afraid the switch is broken.”
–Warly
“Torch friend broke?”
–Wormwood
“The switch is busted.”
–Winona
“What a joke! The switch is broke!”
–Wortox
“Florp! Broke!”
–Wurt
“The switch looks broken.”
–Walter
“It's broken.”
–Wanda
“The flame is calming. If only it would stay lit.”

A broken Flummoxing Flame cannot be directly used by the player, but it can still be toggled by the nearby Flummoxing Flames. Also, when a broken Flame becomes is activated, Shadow Hand will try to deactivate it. Players can step on the Hand to stop it.
Once all Flummoxing Flames are activated, Sanctum Rocks will appear, allowing the player to access the other 3 Sanctum Waymarks.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Câu đố về ngọn lửa Flummoxing là một câu đố xuất hiện ở một trong các căn phòng của Sanctum. Giải câu đố sẽ cho phép người chơi đến được 3 căn phòng, bao gồm cả căn phòng có Đài phun nước Tri thức màu xanh lá cây.
